hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,os; cfg=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR',os.path.expanduser('~/.claude')); entries=json.load(open(os.path.join(cfg,'plugins','installed_plugins.json'))).get('plugins',{}).get('hivemind@danielstewart77',[]); exec(open(os.path.join(entries[0]['installPath'],'hooks','sync_skills.py')).read()) if entries else None"
